targets.rawSql: SELECT count(*) AS "Observations" FROM observations o LEFT JOIN taxa t ON o.taxon_id = t.taxon_id WHERE o.latitude BETWEEN ${min_lat} AND ${max_lat} AND o.longitude BETWEEN ${min_lon} AND ${max_lon} AND (${taxon_id} = 0 OR t.ancestry LIKE '%/' || ${taxon_id}::text || '/%' OR t.taxon_id = ${taxon_id}) AND o.quality_grade IN (${quality_grade:sqlstring});

SELECT count(DISTINCT o.taxon_id) AS "Species" FROM observations o JOIN taxa t ON o.taxon_id = t.taxon_id WHERE t.rank = 'species' AND o.latitude BETWEEN ${min_lat} AND ${max_lat} AND o.longitude BETWEEN ${min_lon} AND ${max_lon} AND (${taxon_id} = 0 OR t.ancestry LIKE '%/' || ${taxon_id}::text || '/%' OR t.taxon_id = ${taxon_id}) AND o.quality_grade IN (${quality_grade:sqlstring});

SELECT count(DISTINCT o.observer_id) AS "Observers" FROM observations o LEFT JOIN taxa t ON o.taxon_id = t.taxon_id WHERE o.latitude BETWEEN ${min_lat} AND ${max_lat} AND o.longitude BETWEEN ${min_lon} AND ${max_lon} AND (${taxon_id} = 0 OR t.ancestry LIKE '%/' || ${taxon_id}::text || '/%' OR t.taxon_id = ${taxon_id}) AND o.quality_grade IN (${quality_grade:sqlstring});

SELECT round(100.0 * sum(CASE WHEN o.quality_grade = 'research' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(count(*), 0), 1) AS "Research Grade %" FROM observations o LEFT JOIN taxa t ON o.taxon_id = t.taxon_id WHERE o.latitude BETWEEN ${min_lat} AND ${max_lat} AND o.longitude BETWEEN ${min_lon} AND ${max_lon} AND (${taxon_id} = 0 OR t.ancestry LIKE '%/' || ${taxon_id}::text || '/%' OR t.taxon_id = ${taxon_id});

SELECT date_trunc('month', o.observed_on) AS time, count(*) AS observations FROM observations o LEFT JOIN taxa t ON o.taxon_id = t.taxon_id WHERE o.observed_on IS NOT NULL AND $__timeFilter(o.observed_on) AND o.latitude BETWEEN ${min_lat} AND ${max_lat} AND o.longitude BETWEEN ${min_lon} AND ${max_lon} AND (${taxon_id} = 0 OR t.ancestry LIKE '%/' || ${taxon_id}::text || '/%' OR t.taxon_id = ${taxon_id}) AND o.quality_grade IN (${quality_grade:sqlstring}) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

SELECT t.name AS species, count(*) AS observations FROM observations o JOIN taxa t ON o.taxon_id = t.taxon_id WHERE t.rank = 'species' AND o.latitude BETWEEN ${min_lat} AND ${max_lat} AND o.longitude BETWEEN ${min_lon} AND ${max_lon} AND (${taxon_id} = 0 OR t.ancestry LIKE '%/' || ${taxon_id}::text || '/%' OR t.taxon_id = ${taxon_id}) AND o.quality_grade IN (${quality_grade:sqlstring}) GROUP BY t.name ORDER BY observations DESC LIMIT 20;

SELECT o.quality_grade AS grade, count(*) AS total FROM observations o LEFT JOIN taxa t ON o.taxon_id = t.taxon_id WHERE o.quality_grade IS NOT NULL AND o.latitude BETWEEN ${min_lat} AND ${max_lat} AND o.longitude BETWEEN ${min_lon} AND ${max_lon} AND (${taxon_id} = 0 OR t.ancestry LIKE '%/' || ${taxon_id}::text || '/%' OR t.taxon_id = ${taxon_id}) GROUP BY o.quality_grade ORDER BY total DESC;

SELECT t.rank, count(*) AS total FROM observations o JOIN taxa t ON o.taxon_id = t.taxon_id WHERE t.rank IS NOT NULL AND o.latitude BETWEEN ${min_lat} AND ${max_lat} AND o.longitude BETWEEN ${min_lon} AND ${max_lon} AND (${taxon_id} = 0 OR t.ancestry LIKE '%/' || ${taxon_id}::text || '/%' OR t.taxon_id = ${taxon_id}) AND o.quality_grade IN (${quality_grade:sqlstring}) GROUP BY t.rank ORDER BY total DESC;

SELECT o.latitude, o.longitude, t.name AS species, o.quality_grade FROM observations o LEFT JOIN taxa t ON o.taxon_id = t.taxon_id WHERE o.geom IS NOT NULL AND o.latitude BETWEEN ${min_lat} AND ${max_lat} AND o.longitude BETWEEN ${min_lon} AND ${max_lon} AND (${taxon_id} = 0 OR t.ancestry LIKE '%/' || ${taxon_id}::text || '/%' OR t.taxon_id = ${taxon_id}) AND o.quality_grade IN (${quality_grade:sqlstring}) LIMIT 5000;

SELECT ob.login, ob.name, count(*) AS observations, count(DISTINCT o.taxon_id) AS species_seen FROM observations o LEFT JOIN taxa t ON o.taxon_id = t.taxon_id JOIN observers ob ON o.observer_id = ob.observer_id WHERE o.latitude BETWEEN ${min_lat} AND ${max_lat} AND o.longitude BETWEEN ${min_lon} AND ${max_lon} AND (${taxon_id} = 0 OR t.ancestry LIKE '%/' || ${taxon_id}::text || '/%' OR t.taxon_id = ${taxon_id}) AND o.quality_grade IN (${quality_grade:sqlstring}) GROUP BY ob.login, ob.name ORDER BY observations DESC LIMIT 20;

SELECT to_char(to_date(EXTRACT(MONTH FROM o.observed_on)::text, 'MM'), 'Mon') AS month_name, count(*) AS observations FROM observations o LEFT JOIN taxa t ON o.taxon_id = t.taxon_id WHERE o.observed_on IS NOT NULL AND o.latitude BETWEEN ${min_lat} AND ${max_lat} AND o.longitude BETWEEN ${min_lon} AND ${max_lon} AND (${taxon_id} = 0 OR t.ancestry LIKE '%/' || ${taxon_id}::text || '/%' OR t.taxon_id = ${taxon_id}) AND o.quality_grade IN (${quality_grade:sqlstring}) GROUP BY EXTRACT(MONTH FROM o.observed_on), month_name ORDER BY EXTRACT(MONTH FROM o.observed_on);

list.name: min_lat
list.label: Min Latitude
list.description: Southern bound of the bounding box

list.name: max_lat
list.label: Max Latitude
list.description: Northern bound of the bounding box

list.name: min_lon
list.label: Min Longitude
list.description: Western bound of the bounding box

list.name: max_lon
list.label: Max Longitude
list.description: Eastern bound of the bounding box

list.name: taxon_id
list.label: Taxon ID
list.description: Filter to a taxonomic group (e.g. 3 = Aves, 20979 = Anura). Set to 0 for all taxa.
